title: lactaria salubris
intro: Lactaria salubris is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the lichen family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lactaria salubris include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of Lactaria salubris typically involve making a tea by infusing the plant's dried material in hot water or using it as a tincture to extract its medicinal compounds.
